questionText: Provide gross masses of CO2 injected and stored for the purposes of CCS during the reporting year according to the injection and storage pathway.
questionKo: CO2 총량 주입 및 저장된 에 대한 purposes of CCS during the 보고연도 according to the injection 및 storage pathway.을/를 입력하십시오.
simpleHelp: There is an increasing investor recognition that CCS/U is one of the very few ways of reducing emissions in energy-intensive industries. Understanding the quantity of CO2 injected by pathway and the expected percentage of this that is intended for long term storage provides investors with insight into the emission reduction potential of organizations CCS/U projects.

options: Acid gas injection (CO2 and H2S co-injected into a production reservoir)
CO2 used for enhanced oil recovery (EOR)
CO2 used for enhanced shale gas recovery (ESGR)
CO2 used for other enhanced gas recovery (EGR)
CO2 used for enhanced coal bed methane (ECBM) operations
CO2 injected into saline formations for long-term storage
CO2 injected into depleted oil and gas reservoirs for long-term storage
CO2 injected into other deep geological formation for long-term storage
CO2 injected into basalts for long-term storage
CO2 injected for storage through mineral carbonation
optionsKo: Acid gas injection (CO2 및 H2S co-injected into a production reservoir)
CO2 used for enhanced oil recovery (E또는)
CO2 used for enhanced shale gas recovery (ESGR)
CO2 used for other enhanced gas recovery (EGR)
CO2 used for enhanced coal bed methane (ECBM) operations
CO2 injected into saline formations for long-term storage
CO2 injected into depleted oil 및 gas reservoirs for long-term storage
CO2 injected into other deep geological formation for long-term storage
CO2 injected into basalts for long-term storage
CO2 injected for storage through mineral carbonation

columns.text: Injected CO2 in the reporting year (metric tons CO2)
columns.textKo: Injected CO2 in the 보고연도 (미터톤 CO2)

columns.text: Percentage of injected CO2 intended for long-term (>10,000 year) storage
columns.textKo: Percentage of injected CO2 intended for long-term (>10,000 year) storage

columns.text: CO2 leakage in the reporting year during injection (metric tons CO2)
columns.textKo: CO2 leakage in the 보고연도 during injection (미터톤 CO2)

columns.text: Cumulative CO2 injected and stored (metric tons CO2)
columns.textKo: Cumulative CO2 주입 및 저장된 (미터톤 CO2)

columns.text: Ongoing leakage (average estimated % of stored CO2 per year)
columns.textKo: Ongoing leakage (average estimated % of stored CO2 per year)

columns.text: Describe your process for monitoring leakage and any long-term storage of the CO2
columns.textKo: your 프로세스 for 모니터링 leakage 및 하나 이상 long-term storage 의 CO2을/를 설명하십시오.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to 7.66.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "Yes" in response to 7.66.

guidance.text:
Injection and storage pathway (column 1)
If you select "Other, please specify," provide a label for the injection and storage pathway.
If your organization is involved in multiple injection and storage pathways, add a row to provide information for each pathway.
Injected CO 2 in the reporting year (metric tons CO 2 ) (column 2) 
Enter in metric tons the amount of CO 2 that was injected via the selected injection and storage pathway in the reporting year.
Percentage of injected CO 2 intended for long-term (>10,000 year) storage (column 3) 
Enter the percentage of CO 2 injected in the reporting year that was intended for long-term/permanent storage of at least 10,000 years.
CO 2 leakage in the reporting year during injection (metric tons CO 2 ) (column 4) 
Enter in metric tons the amount of CO 2 leakage that occurred during injection in the reporting year. See Explanation of Terms for more information.
Year in which injection began (column 5) 
Enter the year in which the injection of CO 2 began.
Cumulative CO 2 injected and stored (metric tons CO 2 ) (column 6) 
Provide the total figure of CO 2 injected and stored over the lifetime of the project to date, since the year in which injection began.
Ongoing leakage (average estimated % of stored CO 2 per year) (column 7) 
Estimate the ongoing leakage of CO 2 over the lifetime of the storage.
This figure should be the average percent of stored CO 2 estimated to leak per year for the lifetime of the storage.
Describe your process for monitoring leakage and any long-term storage of the CO 2 (column 8) 
Describe your process for:
detecting, monitoring, and quantifying CO 2 leakage during injection; and
the ongoing monitoring of stored CO 2 for the purposes of detecting and quantifying CO 2 leakage.
Include the methods used and the intervals at which the monitoring occurs.
guidance.textKo: Injection 및 storage pathway (열 1) 만약 you select "Other, 직접 입력," provide a label 에 대한 injection 및 storage pathway. 만약 귀사 is involved in multiple injection 및 storage pathways, add a 행 to provide information for each pathway. Injected CO 2 in the 보고연도 (metric tons CO 2) (열 2) Enter in metric tons the amount of CO 2 that was injected via the 선택 injection 및 storage pathway in the 보고연도. Percentage of injected CO 2 intended for long-term (>10,000 year) storage (열 3) Enter the percentage of CO 2 injected in the 보고연도 that was intended for long-term/permanent storage of 최소 10,000 years. CO 2 leakage in the 보고연도 during injection (metric tons CO 2) (열 4) Enter in metric tons the amount of CO 2 leakage that occurred during injection in the 보고연도. See 설명 of Terms for more information. Year in which injection began (열 5) Enter the year in which the injection of CO 2 began. Cumulative CO 2 주입 및 저장된 (metric tons CO 2) (열 6) Provide the total figure of CO 2 주입 및 저장된 over the lifetime 의 project to date, since the year in which injection began. Ongoing leakage (average estimated % of stored CO 2 per year) (열 7) Estimate the ongoing leakage of CO 2 over the lifetime 의 storage. This figure 해야 합니다 be the average percent of stored CO 2 estimated to leak per year 에 대한 lifetime 의 storage. 설명 your 프로세스 for 모니터링 leakage 및 하나 이상 long-term storage 의 CO 2 (열 8) 설명 your 프로세스 for: detecting, 모니터링, 및 quantifying CO 2 leakage during injection; 및 the ongoing 모니터링 of stored CO 2 에 대한 purposes of detecting 및 quantifying CO 2 leakage. Include the methods used 및 the intervals at which the 모니터링 occurs.

guidance.text: Where CCS is used, storage is long-term, monitored, and with minimal leakage.
guidance.textKo: 여기서 CCS is used, storage is long-term, monitored, 및 with minimal leakage.

guidance.text:
CO 2 injection: Injecting CO 2 into carefully selected and managed deep geological formations (e.g. saline formations, depleted oil and gas reservoirs, enhanced oil recovery operations or enhanced coal-bed methane deposits), some of which previously contained hydrocarbons for millions of years.
CO 2 leakage (CCS): also referred to as carbon leakage or seepage, refers to CO 2 losses to the atmosphere at storage sites due to infrastructure or storage malfunctions.
guidance.textKo: CO 2 injection: Injecting CO 2 into carefully 선택 및 managed deep geological formations (e.g. saline formations, depleted oil 및 gas reservoirs, enhanced oil recovery operations 또는 enhanced coal-bed methane deposits), some of which previously contained hydrocarbons for millions of years. CO 2 leakage (CCS): also referred to as carbon leakage 또는 seepage, refers to CO 2 losses to the atmosphere at storage sites due to 인프라 또는 storage malfunctions.

Understanding the quantity of CO2 injected by pathway 및 the expected percentage of this that is intended for long term storage provides investors with insight into the emission reduction potential of organizations CCS/U projects.
